title: Neelavizhi Nilavai Lyrics Thulli Ezhunthathu Kadhal Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Rahul Nambiar, Shreya Ghoshal, Saindhavi
Song: Neelavizhi Nilavai
Lyrics : Yuga Bharathi

Movie: Thulli Ezhunthathu Kadhal
Music: BOBO Shashi

Neelavizhi nilavaai thiriya,
ninra idam malaraai viriya
maaruthalai naanum ariya,
enna idhu kaadhal sugama

Paona vali adada maraya,
punnagaiyil ulage uraiya
kaadhal ennai kaadhal puriya,
kan imaiyil anbe thangidava

Varavillai vaarthai ne sirithal
pala minnal thondruthu imaithal
kaanavillaye manam unanaye
unnai kaanbatharke athu senrathe

Mazhai ninridamale adithal
adhu rendu peraiyum ninaithal
Iravin payan onragume
Perugividum santhosame
Iruthivarai ellavume
iruvaradhu kai serume

Thalli irunthathe aavale
thannai maranthathu inruthaan
thulli ezhunthadhe kaadhale
thollai kodukuthe ninruthaan

Tholaindhu ponaho urakam
ennai vandhu serudhe kulappam
thevai illaiye kanvengiren
unnai nijamenru dan uyir ennuthe

Alavilla kadhalai koduthaai
adhai nenjil thaangudhu ninaithaal
imai irandum poovagume
naalai maranthu naal pogume
iru idhayam onragume
idaiveligal thoolaagume

Ivan uyirum un moochile, inaithirukume anbile
unadhuyirum en moochile ,kalandhirukume mannile

Paona vali adada maraya, punnagaiyil ulage uraiya
kaadhal ennai kaadhal puriya, kan imaiyil anbe thangidava

Neelavizhi nilavaai thiriya, ninra idam malaraai viriya
maaruthalai naanum ariya, enna idhu maayam seiyudhamma

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Neelavizhi Nilavai?

The song conveys deep emotions of love and longing, expressing the beauty of romantic relationships.

What is the plot context of the movie Thulli Ezhunthathu Kadhal?

The movie revolves around the complexities of love and relationships, showcasing various emotional experiences.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Rahul Nambiar, Saindhavi, and Shreya Ghoshal.

Who composed the music for Thulli Ezhunthathu Kadhal?

The music for the film was composed by Bobo Shashi.

When was Neelavizhi Nilavai released?

The song was released on November 7, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Neelavizhi Nilavai, the characters experience a tender moment that encapsulates the essence of love and affection. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and warmth, making it perfect for romantic occasions. As the singers harmonize beautifully, the emotions conveyed resonate deeply with listeners. This enchanting track is a highlight of the film Thulli Ezhunthathu Kadhal, showcasing the power of love through music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Neelavizhi Nilavai from Thulli Ezhunthathu Kadhal is a mesmerizing romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting voices of Rahul Nambiar, Saindhavi, and Shreya Ghoshal, this song creates a soothing atmosphere that resonates with the heart. The collaboration of these talented artists under the music direction of Bobo Shashi makes it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: Neelavizhi moonlight shines, your place blooms like a flower, I too want to know, what is this love, is it sweet?
The pain of separation is hidden, in the smile, the world speaks of love, love understands me, my dear, it embraces me in dreams.
Words haven't come, but when you smile, many lightning strikes, my heart can't see you, to see you, that is the reason.
If rain stops, it thinks of both, the joy of my heart will grow, until the end, everything will be in their hands.
She who was left behind has forgotten herself, now love has awakened, it has given me a gift, it stands still.
Did the dream go away, or did it come to me? There is no need for confusion, I see you, truly you are my life.
You gave me love without limits, if I think about it in my heart, both the present and the future will bloom like flowers, tomorrow will forget today, both hearts will unite and become one.
Your life is in my breath, your life is in my breath, we are intertwined in this world.
The pain of separation is hidden, in the smile, the world speaks of love, love understands me, my dear, it embraces me in dreams.
Neelavizhi moonlight shines, your place blooms like a flower, I too want to know, what is this magic happening?
